title: collapse expand all groups at the same time
excerpt: I would like a button at the top of the board that i could click and it would collapse all groups and expand all groups. This would hugely help with bigger boards to go to the section you want more quickly

posts.author: kjur (Ken Jur)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like a button at the top of the board that i could click and it would collapse all groups and expand all groups. This would hugely help with bigger boards to go to the section you want more quickly

posts.author: AshcroftJewellery (Christian Fox )
posts.cookedHtml:
Apologies if I have misunderstood - but Ctrl + G or Cmnd + G are the keyboard shortcuts

Is this what you mean?
